parameters.content:
## Odin — Photo Prefill Webhook

**POST /prefill**

Called immediately after user takes a photo on the Add page — BEFORE form submission.

**Input:**
```
{
  photo: "<base64 jpeg>",
  userId: "<optional>"
}
```

**Output:**
```
{
  success: true,
  title: "Cosy Espresso Bar",   ← shown to user, editable
  description: "A warm brick...", ← hidden field, for search only
  category: "place"              ← prefills category picker
}
```

Field mapping:
- title → shown, user edits if needed
- description → hidden in form, goes to Supabase for embedding
- personal_note / Your Take → user types this themselves
- address → user picks via location picker

NOTE: Uses gpt-4o with detail:low for speed + low cost (~$0.001 per call).
